stories.title: Copy of No matter the France result, Paraguay's inspired W...
stories.summary: Back at the World Cup for the first time since 2010, Paraguay have already stunned Germany. Now, they face an even greater challenge against an in-form France.

stories.title: World Cup live: Morocco reach quarterfinals after ...
Ounahi brace for Morocco eliminates Canada
stories.summary: A second-half brace from Azzedine Ounahi and a third from Soufiane Rahimi saw Morocco become the first nation to make the quarterfinals of the World Cup with a 3-0 win over co-hosts Canada.

stories.title: Ream: USMNT a 'true representation of America'
stories.summary: USMNT defender Tim Ream said the diverse background of the players on the USMNT is "a true representation of what America is."

stories.title: Sources: U-M retains 5-star McCoy after May exit
stories.summary: Michigan is keeping five-star prospect Brandon McCoy Jr., the latest recruit to announce his intention to stay in the wake of coach Dusty May's departure.
